---
title: "Black Gold Equity Partners Business Plan"
author: "Lyons Command Center"
date: "INSERT_DATE"
lang: "en"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    colorlinks: true
    geometry:
      - left=2.5cm
      - right=2.5cm
      - top=2.5cm
      - bottom=2.5cm
    fontsize: 11pt
    mainfont: "Open Sans"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

# Executive Summary

Evidence class: verified_fact
Source: file://APPROVED_SOURCE_URI

- INSERT_SUMMARY_POINTS_HERE

# Evidence Ledger

| Evidence ID | Source | Class | Confidence | Owner |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| EVIDENCE_001 | SOURCE_URI | verified_fact | 0.95 | Miles |
| EVIDENCE_002 | SOURCE_URI | estimate | 0.7 | Malcolm |

> Confidentiality notice: this document is governed by the Lyons Command Center approval chain. Do not distribute without explicit release.
